name: debug_investigation_result
description: Chain-eval tool for systematic-debugging initial investigation checkpoint. Captures structured root cause investigation output for cross-step assertion.

bug_classification.description: Preliminary bug category based on the initial investigation

root_cause_hypothesis.description: Primary hypothesis about the root cause, stated as a falsifiable claim

evidence_sources.description: Evidence sources consulted or recommended (logs, metrics, code paths)

affected_components.description: Domain or component names affected by the bug

investigation_complete.description: Whether the initial investigation has reached a testable hypothesis
